overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk indoor food market. The player walks through a narrow corridor lined with red and green neon stalls, stops at a service counter with a vendor wearing a conical hat, then continues past the counter through a bar area with industrial piping and digital signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food market corridor with neon stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market corridor toward the food stalls

entered.detail: food stall with bright red neon lighting and metal counter
bar area with green neon signage and stools visible in the distance
industrial ventilation pipes and ductwork running along the ceiling
vertical metal beams supporting the market structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow cyberpunk market corridor lined with industrial metal columns. A red-lit food stall dominates the left side while green neon illuminates a bar area on the right. The ceiling shows exposed industrial piping, and scattered NPCs stand in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: food service counter with red neon lighting

events.description: slows down and stops at the service counter to face the vendor

agents.ego_description: standing at the counter facing the vendor, appearing to examine the menu or place an order

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing traditional conical hat and red gloves standing behind the metal counter

entered.detail: long metal counter with worn surface and menu papers spread across it
bright linear fluorescent fixtures hanging above the counter casting red light
printed menus and flyers lying on the counter surface
shelves with bottles and containers behind the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a metal service counter bathed in red neon light from overhead fluorescent fixtures. A vendor wearing a distinctive conical hat stands behind the counter. Menu papers and condiment bottles are visible on the counter surface as the player appears to interact with the vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: market walkway with customer queue and bar seating

events.description: resumes walking and moves past the counter, revealing customers waiting on the other side

agents.ego_description: moving past the counter through the customer waiting area toward the bar section

notable_agents.action: customer in green jacket with pink hair standing at the counter
group of customers browsing the menu and waiting in line

entered.detail: stack of newspapers or flyers on the counter edge with visible headlines
open space in front of the counter where customers gather
bright green bar stools lined up along the counter on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the counter, revealing customers waiting in the queue area. A customer in a green jacket stands prominently on the right. Green bar stools come into view on the right side as the camera advances through the market walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar area with industrial piping and digital menu screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar area toward the back of the market, passing empty stools

entered.detail: large blue-grey industrial ventilation pipes running vertically along the wall
hanging digital displays showing menu items above the bar counter
purple and red illuminated vending machine or kiosk in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the bar area, passing green stools and large industrial pipes on the right. Digital menu screens hang above the counter, and condiment trays with stacked bowls sit on the bar surface. The corridor extends toward a neon-lit background with purple signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow cyberpunk market that transitions from a red-lit food corridor into a green-hued industrial bar area. It begins by moving past metal columns under exposed ceiling pipes, where red neon from a food stall clashes with green light from a nearby bar. The camera then comes to a halt at a metal service counter to interact with a vendor in a conical hat, surrounded by menu papers and condiment bottles under red fluorescent fixtures. As the camera moves past the counter, the scene opens up to reveal waiting customers and a row of green bar stools lining the walkway. The movement finally carries the viewer deeper into the bar area, passing large industrial pipes and digital menu screens before heading toward a distant background of purple neon signage.
